ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number where the gene is located */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (+ or -) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "is_pseudo" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the gene is a pseudogene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that the transcript belongs to */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcript on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the transcript on the chromosome */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Type of transcript (e.g., mRNA, lncRNA) */,
  "cds_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the coding sequence */,
  "cds_end" INTEGER /* End position of the coding sequence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transcript data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript that the exon belongs to */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the exon on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the exon on the chromosome */,
  "phase" INTEGER /* Phase of the exon (0, 1, or 2) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exon data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene model */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of gene model (e.g., canonical, alternative) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene model data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_models_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomes" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome */,
  "genome_name" TEXT /* Name of the genome */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism that the genome belongs to */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the genome was released */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genome data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., function, description, keyword) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_levels" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression level */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that the expression level belongs to */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that the expression level was measured in */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the expression level (e.g., FPKM, TPM) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment condition for the experiment */,
  "timepoint" TEXT /* Timepoint at which the expression level was measured */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the expression data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_levels_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_levels_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., RNA-seq, microarray) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the experiment data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the user is a member of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., PI, collaborator) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the project */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user left the project (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that the variation belongs to */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of variation (e.g., SNP, insertion) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele at the variation position */,
  "alternative_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele at the variation position */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the variation (e.g., missense, synonymous) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the variation data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, file) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "api_key_type" TEXT /* Type of API key (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key expires (if applicable) */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
